title: Massive Somali Fraud in Minnesota with Nick Shirley, California Asset Seizure, $20B Groq-Nvidia Deal
description:
(0:00) Bestie intros! Nick Shirley joins the show to discuss his recent investigation on potential daycare fraud in Minnesota
(3:32) Nick's background, how he got into investigative reporting and YouTube, independence, finding this story
(16:36) Why this fraud story is resonating, why the national press initially avoided it
(30:08) Future plans, California, possible Al-Shabaab connection, how high up does Minnesota's fraud go?
(49:15) What the scale of fraud means for America, Minnesota's future, potential patronage scheme
(1:09:06) CA's wealth tax: normalizing the seizure of private property
(1:33:56) Chamath breaks down the $20B Groq-Nvidia deal
